shot_notes: Scaling the massive wall via ladder
evidence_summary: Establish the physical scale of the wall and the transition into a fragile, high-stakes porcelain environment where movement must be hyper-calculated.

The travelers use a wooden ladder constructed by the Tin Woodman to scale a massive wall. Upon crossing over, they enter the Dainty China Country, immediately realizing that every movement must be calculated to avoid destruction.
Characters gathered at the base of the massive wall with a wooden ladder.
Characters frozen in cautious movement upon the porcelain floor.
Scaling the wall via ladder and entering the fragile china country.
